species.citation: (Copel.) R.M.Tryon , Contr. Gray Herb. 200 (1970) 23; ≡ Gymnosphaera trichophora (Copel.) Copel. , Gen. Fil. (Copel.) (1947) 99; ≡ Cyathea trichophora Copel. , PJS 6c (1911) 363 ; Holttum, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 1 (1959) 151.
species.distribution: Borneo, Philippines. BASILAN, LEYTE, LUZON: Laguna, Quezon, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Zamboanga Sibugay, Zamboanga del Sur, NEGROS, PALAWAN.

species.citation: (Copel.) R.M.Tryon , Contr. Gray Herb. 200 (1970) 23; ≡ Cyathea tripinnata Copel. , PJS 1(Suppl.) (1906) 251 ; Holttum, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 1 (1959) 140. = Cyathea densisora Alderw. , Bull. Jard. Bot. Buitenzorg, 3rd Sér. 2 (1920) 138. = Cyathea leucostegia Copel. , PJS 38 (1929) 130. = Cyathea leytensis Copel. , PJS 38 (1929) 131.
species.distribution: Borneo, Java, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Philippines, Sulawesi. CAMIGUIN, CATANDUANES, LEYTE, LUZON: Bataan, Kalinga, Rizal, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao Oriental, Davao del Sur, Sarangani, South Cotabato, Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS, PANAY.

species.citation: (Copel.) R.M.Tryon , Contr. Gray Herb. 200 (1970) 24; ≡ Cyathea zamboangana Copel. , PJS 30 (1926) 325 ; Holttum, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 1 (1959) 147. = Cyathea urdanetensis Copel. , PJS 38 (1929) 132.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Agusan, Agusan del Norte, Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Sur, NEGROS, ?SAMAR.

species.citation: (Blume) R.M.Tryon , Contr. Gray Herb. 200 (1970) 23; ≡ Cyathea squamulata (Blume) Copel. , PJS 4c (1909) 37 ; Holttum, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 1 (1959) 152; ≡ Gymnosphaera squamulata Blume , Enum. Pl. Javae (1828) 243.
species.distribution: Borneo, Java, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, ?Philippines, Singapore, Sumatra.
